svg.text: Fan-off thermal stress: controller keeps serving
Representative real runs. Aggregate medians exclude airflow-affected controller_002 and use controller_002_rerun.
Raspberry Pi 5, active fan disconnected, airflow blocked, open-loop arrival every 6 s, 1200 s target window.
N=3 aggregate: Q8 fixed throttled 3/3; controller and Q4 fixed completed 3/3 with no throttle. Output quality, long-run stability, hardware wear, and energy efficiency were not evaluated.
